title: Scope ADV instruction load to ADV-using sessions

tasks.title: Update sync-global config + provider prompt contract.
tasks.verification: RED: sync-global/overlay tests failed on old global ADV_INSTRUCTIONS contract and missing scoped instruction body in provider prompts. GREEN: updated sync-global.sh to remove global ADV_INSTRUCTIONS from instructions[], generate provider prompts as canonical adv body + ADV_INSTRUCTIONS + provider hint, and regenerate expected content in check mode. Targeted verification: pnpm test -- src/sync-global.test.ts src/overlay-sync-assets.test.ts passed.

tasks.title: Update provider-eval prompt model to match new 3-part provider prompt assembly.
tasks.verification: Provider-eval prompt model updated to canonical + ADV_INSTRUCTIONS + provider hint in scripts/provider-eval.ts. Focused verification: pnpm test -- src/sync-global.test.ts passed (153 files passed | 1862 tests passed in targeted run). No additional file changes after T1 checkpoint; task recorded clean.

tasks.title: Resolve cross-agent references and add contract tests for ADV-only instruction scope.
tasks.verification: RED: new overlay-sync asset test failed because non-ADV build agent contained trailing `See ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md § Large-Scope Validity`. GREEN: removed dangling section ref while keeping full rule inline. Verification: pnpm test -- src/overlay-sync-assets.test.ts passed (153 files passed | 1863 tests passed in targeted run).

tasks.title: Add spec requirement for scoped ADV instruction loading.
tasks.verification: Updated .adv/specs/advance-meta/spec.json with rq-scopedAdvInstructions01 covering ADV provider prompt inclusion, global instructions[] removal, non-ADV marker absence, and unrelated instruction preservation. Verified JSON syntax with node JSON.parse.

tasks.title: Full verification and live sync dry-run.
tasks.verification: pnpm test initially failed on spec-citation-invariant because rq-scopedAdvInstructions01 lacked an external citation. Added citation comment in plugin/src/sync-global.test.ts, reran focused invariant test: PASS (153 files passed | 1863 tests passed | 2 skipped). Reran pnpm test: PASS (153 files passed | 1863 tests passed | 2 skipped). pnpm run check initially failed on Prettier for sync-global.test.ts; formatted file and reran: PASS. pnpm run build: PASS. scripts/sync-global.sh --dry-run --diff from worktree root: PASS.

tasks.title: Update setup documentation for scoped instruction-loading model.
tasks.verification: Updated SETUP.md: --fix bullet now removes legacy global ADV_INSTRUCTIONS entries and embeds protocol into ADV provider prompts; manual setup example no longer adds ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md to instructions[]; migration note added. Grep confirms no active instruction telling users to add ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md globally (only migration example remains).

design.approval_evidence: Design validator returned CAUTION with required changes RC1-RC4. All required changes incorporated into design: (1) do not copy ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md into agent-parts; generator/check read canonical repo path directly; (2) provider-eval.ts update marked required; (3) command-file refs explicitly safe because ADV agents receive body; (4) check/fix distinguishes canonical repo path from stale global-copy path. No CONFLICT, no user-value tradeoff, no contract compromise. Proceeding to planning.

planning.approval_evidence: User replied approve — prep/vision approval for 6-task graph, design validated with CAUTION resolved.

execution.approval_evidence: All 6 planned tasks completed and checkpointed. Final verification passed: pnpm test, pnpm run check, pnpm run build, scripts/sync-global.sh --dry-run --diff. Worktree clean at checkpoint 4f623283dc5d770b3728f279c9436af0440ac92b.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User replied `accept` after APPROVED review verdict. Review findings contained no blockers/issues; suggestions/nits rejected with evidence. Verification evidence: pnpm test PASS, pnpm run check PASS, pnpm run build PASS, scripts/sync-global.sh --dry-run --diff PASS.

release.approval_evidence: User replied `sign off` at Tier B archive sign-off prompt. Harden status READY: no blocking findings; full verification and merge dry-run passed. Proceeding with archive execution and git finalization.

clarify_findings.message: Success criteria are placeholder or empty. What measurable outcomes define done?
Proposal has no Scope section. What files and modules will be affected?
Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
